Hello. I'm an 80-year-old customer and I'm a bit confused about a charge on my account. Amazon took about £89 from me but I can't remember what it was for. I'm not sure if it was even me who made that transaction. My account number is 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 and I think my sort code is either 3 3 1 1 2 2, 1 1 3 3 2 2, or 1 1 2 2 3 3. I've had this account for a long time so I can't quite recall the details. Could you please look into this charge and let me know what it was for?
